contentList.content: A dark ring pulsing with the power of the Lord of Murder. The wearer is protected from critical hits, charming, and paralysis. A portion of damage dealt is returned as healing. Once per combat, can summon bloody projections — illusory duplicates like those that surrounded Sarevok.
Critical hits against you become normal hits.
You are immune to Charmed and Paralyzed.
Summon three bloody illusory duplicates. The duplicates absorb attacks directed at you and grant +6 to AC. Once per combat.
Creates 3 illusory copies, each absorbs one hit.
Bloody illusory duplicates protect you. +6 to Armour Class. Attacks against you may hit a copy instead.

A ring bearing the absolute will of the Lord of Murder. Critical hits deal extra force damage and may apply crawler mucus poison. Each kill grants a stack of Unstoppable. The weak can be erased from existence.
On a critical hit, deal an additional 1d6 Force damage.
On a melee critical hit, 20% chance to apply Crawler Mucus (paralysis) to the target for 2 turns.
Each kill grants a stack of Unstoppable (max 3). Each stack absorbs one hit, making you invulnerable.
Turn a weak enemy to dust. The target disintegrates. Only works on enemies whose level is 3 or more below yours. Once per combat.

A cursed dagger of the Lord of Murder. Its blade cuts through any defense — resistances and immunities are meaningless. Critical hits land on 18+ on the die. If your off-hand is empty, gain +4 AC. Every hit silences and bleeds the target.
+6 weapon damage (from level 4). +4 Armour Class when your off-hand is empty.
Every hit with this weapon applies Silence and Bleeding to the target for 2 turns.
Critical hits land on a roll of 18+ (-2 to crit threshold).
Detonate a dead body in a necromantic blast. Deals 12d6 Fire and 6d6 Necrotic damage in a 6m radius, igniting targets. Once per combat.
Amulet of the Lord of Murder. +4 Constitution. The Aura of Murder (unlocked at level 10) makes nearby enemies vulnerable to Piercing damage. Protects the wearer from the Shadow Curse.
Nearby enemies (3m) become vulnerable to Piercing damage.
You are protected from the Shadow Curse.
Attacks against Bleeding targets are made with Advantage.
This target is vulnerable to Piercing damage due to the Aura of Murder.
Boots steeped in the shadow of the Lord of Murder. +2 to Stealth. You cannot be forcibly moved and ignore difficult terrain. Once per short rest, step through the shadows.
You cannot be forcibly moved by enemy spells or actions. Difficult terrain does not affect you, and you cannot be knocked prone.
You can step through shadow to appear elsewhere.
Teleport to any point within range, even without line of sight. Once per combat, bonus action.

Gloves crafted from the skin of victims, blessed by Bhaal. Critical hits have a chance to poison the target. Your attacks prevent the target from regaining HP. Grants Advantage on Sleight of Hand and +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC.
On a critical hit, 50% chance to apply Poisoned to the target for 3 turns.
Advantage on Sleight of Hand checks.
+1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC.
Targets hit by your attacks cannot regain HP for 2 turns.
A cloak woven from the shadow of the Lord of Murder. After killing an enemy, you become invisible for 3 turns. Grants an additional bonus action. Once per combat, dissolve into shadows.
After killing an enemy, you become invisible for 3 turns. Invisibility ends when you attack or cast a spell.
You gain an additional bonus action.
You dissolve into the shadows, becoming invisible for 3 turns. Invisibility ends when you attack or cast a spell. Once per combat, bonus action.
A crown of dark metal pulsing with the will of the Lord of Murder. You cannot be stunned or frightened. You see through magical darkness and invisibility. Critical hits land more easily.
You can see in magical or mundane darkness up to [1]. You cannot be blinded.
You cannot be frightened or affected by any other emotion-altering effect.
Armour woven from shadow and blood. AC 14 + full Dexterity modifier. Does not impose disadvantage on Stealth. All incoming damage reduced by 3, and you gain +2 to all saving throws.
Add your full Dexterity modifier to your Armour Class. This armour does not impose disadvantage on Stealth checks.
Your next attack is a guaranteed critical hit.
All incoming damage is reduced by [1].
A pistol consecrated to the Lord of Murder. Grants the Shrapnel Grenade and Demolition Bullet abilities.
Hurl a shrapnel grenade dealing Piercing damage equal to twice your character level in a 4m radius. Targets suffer Bleeding (8 turns) and Deep Wound (4 turns). Dexterity DC 14. Once per combat.

Fire an explosive bullet at the target, dealing 2d6 Piercing damage on hit and triggering a Fireball-strength detonation at their location (8d6 Fire, 5m radius, Dexterity DC 14 for half). Once per combat.
